violations.text: At the time of inspection, the hand sink located near the drive-thru sandwich prep area was being used as a dump sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Owner is to ensure that the hand sink is properly designated/supplied/used as nothing other than a hand sink as required. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2025

Working containers of dry ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2025

Insect control devices were observed located over food prep areas (the pastry prep counter, dough mixers). Insect control devices shall be installed so that the devices are not located over FOOD preparation areas. Insect control devices were removed from prep areas at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2025

At the time of inspection, the dump sink at the counter next to the coffee units was observed to have a slow drain (possibly clogged). A plumbing system is to be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2025

The following areas of the physical facilities were observed in need of repair/adjustment: - The floor was observed to have cracked/missing tiles - The ceiling was observed to have missing tiles (per the owner, due for replacement) - The sealed wall material (FRP Board) was observed in need of sealing of corners/seams near the floor mop sink and the dough mixer wall New Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2026
The cold-water was not flowing at the right side 3-bay sink faucet while turned on at the time of inspection. Plumbing system is to be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2025

Tiles along the ceiling/hood juncture in the kitchen area were observed to be missing exposing the structure above. Per the PIC, tiles to be replaced to close the ceiling. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2025
